description: Workspace eval workbench scenario suggestion prompt JSON output.

tests.description: [smoke] eval workbench suggest-scenario returns exact JSON shape

assert.value: (() => { const trimmed = output.trim(); if (!trimmed.startsWith('{') || !trimmed.endsWith('}')) return false; const data = JSON.parse(trimmed); if (typeof data.prompt !== 'string' || data.prompt.trim().length === 0) return false; if (!Array.isArray(data.expectations) || data.expectations.length < 1 || data.expectations.length > 3) return false; if (!('shouldTrigger' in data) || data.shouldTrigger !== null) return false; if (!data.expectations.every((item) => typeof item === 'string' && item.trim().length > 0)) return false; const topKeys = Object.keys(data).sort().join(','); return topKeys === 'expectations,prompt,shouldTrigger'; })()
